mapper.select: select id, name, type, description, is_system, status, created_by, created_at, updated_by, updated_at from project_template where status = 'ENABLED' order by is_system desc, created_at asc limit 1
mapper.update: update project_template set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, description = #{description}, is_system = #{isSystem}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} where id = #{id}
